title: Upload Youtube Shorts from Monday.com
excerpt: Get ready to unlock a world of possibilities as we show you how to bring Monday.com and YouTube together effortlessly. Say goodbye to the complexities of manual uploads and say hello to a streamlined, time-saving workflo…

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Get ready to unlock a world of possibilities as we show you how to bring Monday.com and YouTube together effortlessly. Say goodbye to the complexities of manual uploads and say hello to a streamlined, time-saving workflow that will leave you in awe.

Introducing the seamless integration of Monday.com and the YouTube app, designed to make uploading YouTube shorts a breeze.

Here’s how it works:
Videos are automatically fetched from your Monday board, sorted based on their publish dates.
With the “Upload a Video” module, you can effortlessly post these videos directly to YouTube.
Include the hashtag #shorts in the title or description of each video. Use the correct aspect ratio required for YouTube shorts, ensuring a visually stunning experience for your viewers.

Say goodbye to manual uploads and hello to a streamlined process! With the power of Monday.com and the YouTube app, uploading YouTube shorts has never been easier.

Are you an automation pro using Make (formerly Integromat), Zapier, or other no-code tools? This integration is tailor-made for you!

Join the automation revolution and start uploading YouTube shorts effortlessly using the Monday.com-Youtube app integration.
